nl: The retained parser selects every and only JSONL event matching the requested inclusive time window and case-insensitive severity set on the concrete log fixture.

Malformed JSON, missing required fields, invalid timestamps, and optional fields are handled exactly according to the task policy without crashing, shifting later records, or silently inventing values.
The output is valid CSV with the required header order, quoting, Unicode, commas, quotes, and newlines preserved, and every output field equals its source event value.
The shipped or repaired parser reruns from the original unchanged JSONL input to the requested output path and passes all supplied executable cases.
